[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / min

# Method: min()

## Call Signature

```ts
min(...values): number;
```

Return the smallest value in a sequence.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| ...`values` | `number`[] | Values to compare. |

### Returns

`number`

Smallest value.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="min" encoded-code="_IDExMCA6IDIzMCk7CgkJdC5yZWN0KDEsIHQuYWJzKHZhbHVlc1tpXSkgKyAxKTsKCQl0LnBvcCgpOwoJfQoKCXQuY2hhcignLScpOwoJdC5jaGFyQ29sb3IoMjU1LCAxNjAsIDExMCk7Cgl0LmxpbmUoLTIzLCA2IC0gbG93LCAyMywgNiAtIGxvdyk7Cn0pOwoKbGFiZWxMYXllci5kcmF3KCgpID0--IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />

## Call Signature

```ts
min(values): number;
```

Return the smallest value in an array.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `values` | readonly `number`[] | Values to compare. |

### Returns

`number`

Smallest value.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="min" encoded-code="_IDExMCA6IDIzMCk7CgkJdC5yZWN0KDEsIHQuYWJzKHZhbHVlc1tpXSkgKyAxKTsKCQl0LnBvcCgpOwoJfQoKCXQuY2hhcignLScpOwoJdC5jaGFyQ29sb3IoMjU1LCAxNjAsIDExMCk7Cgl0LmxpbmUoLTIzLCA2IC0gbG93LCAyMywgNiAtIGxvdyk7Cn0pOwoKbGFiZWxMYXllci5kcmF3KCgpID0--IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />
